/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/openssl@3/lib CMakeFiles/gadgetlib1_r1cs_ppzksnark_verifier_gadget_test.dir/gadgetlib1/gadgets/verifiers/tests/test_r1cs_ppzksnark_verifier_gadget.cpp.o -o gadgetlib1_r1cs_ppzksnark_verifier_gadget_test  libsnark.a ../depends/libff/libff/libff.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmpxx.dylib -lcrypto
